info.title: Hyper-V Agent API
info.description: REST API exposing Hyper-V host functions (HCS, HCN, WMI, VHD).

post.summary: Creates a new container using specified backend (HCS or WMI).

get.summary: Lists all containers from both HCS and WMI backends.
Gets recent tasks (last hour by default).
Gets combined host details (hardware, system, performance).

get.description: Gets list of all storage jobs.
Gets details of a specific storage job.
Gets elements affected by a storage job.

post.description: Cancels a storage job.

get.description: Lists all HCN and WMI networks.
Lists physical network adapters for external switch creation.

post.description: Creates a NAT virtual switch via HCN API.
Creates a virtual switch via WMI API (Internal/Private/External types supported).

put.description: Updates a WMI virtual switch settings (name, notes).

delete.description: Deletes a network by ID (supports both HCN and WMI).

get.description: Gets properties of a network by ID.

post.description: Creates an endpoint in the specified network.

get.description: Gets properties of an endpoint by ID.

put.description: Enables or disables a specific extension on a virtual switch.

get.description: Checks if the virtual switch supports trunk mode.

post.description: Creates a FibreChannel SAN pool.

delete.description: Deletes a FibreChannel SAN pool by ID.

get.description: Retrieves information for a FibreChannel SAN pool.

post.description: Creates a virtual FibreChannel port for a VM.

get.description: Returns health status of the agent.
Returns the health status of the HyperV agent.
Returns information about the HyperV agent.

get.summary: Lists all fixed storage devices with details (name, filesystem, size, used, free).
Gets suitable storage locations for VHDX based on minimum free space.

post.description: Creates a VM using HCS or WMI API based on Mode parameter.

get.description: Lists all VMs from both HCS and WMI backends.
Uses HCS and WMI to verify if a VM with given name exists.

post.description: Starts a VM with the given name.
Stops a VM with the given name.
Gracefully shuts down a VM with the given name.
Forcefully terminates a VM with the given name.
Pauses a VM with the given name.
Resumes a paused VM with the given name.
Saves the state of a VM with the given name.

get.description: Gets properties of a VM with the given name.

post.description: Modifies configuration of a VM with the given name.
Modifies VM configuration (memory, CPU, notes).

get.description: Lists all snapshots for a VM.

post.description: Creates a snapshot of a VM.
Reverts a VM to a specific snapshot.

get.description: Gets list of storage devices in a VM.

post.description: Adds a storage device to a VM.

delete.description: Removes a storage device from a VM.

get.description: Gets list of storage controllers in a VM.
Gets list of virtual drives in a VM.
Gets details of a specific virtual drive.
Gets operational state of a virtual drive.

post.description: Resets a virtual drive.

put.description: Locks or unlocks media in a virtual drive.

get.description: Gets capabilities of a virtual drive.
Gets dynamic memory status including available buffer and swap usage.
Gets the swap file data root location for a VM.

put.description: Updates the swap file data root location for a VM.

get.description: Checks if metric collection is enabled for a VM and specific metric.
Lists discrete metrics composing aggregate metrics for a VM.

post.description: Enables metric collection for a VM by creating Msvm_MetricDefForME associations for specified or default metrics.

get.description: Lists metrics for a specific resource pool.
Gets the generation type (1 or 2) for a VM.
Gets the secure boot enabled state for a VM.

put.description: Updates the secure boot enabled state for a VM.

get.description: Gets the boot device order for a VM.

put.description: Updates the boot device order for a VM.

post.description: Migrates a VM to a destination host.

get.description: Gets application health status from heartbeat component.

post.description: Copies a file from host to guest VM.

deviceType.description: Type of storage device to add

path.description: Path to the storage file (for virtual devices)

controllerId.description: Controller ID to attach the device to

controllerLocation.description: Specific location on the controller (optional, auto-assign if not specified)

AddStorageDeviceRequest.description: Request model for adding a storage device to a VM

ContainerCreationMode.description: Container creation mode - HCS or WMI.

name.description: Container name visible in management tools.

storageSizeGB.description: Storage size in GB (for persistent containers).

CreateContainerRequest.description: Request to create a new Hyper-V container.

CreateFcPortRequest.description: Request model for creating FC port.

name.description: Nazwa VM widoczna w menedżerze Hyper-V.

secureBoot.description: Czy włączyć Secure Boot (tylko dla Generation 2).

vhdPath.description: Ścieżka do pliku VHD/VHDX. Jeśli nie podano, zostanie utworzona automatycznie.

switchName.description: Nazwa przełącznika sieciowego do podłączenia VM.

CreateVmRequest.description: Żądanie utworzenia nowej maszyny wirtualnej Hyper-V.

GuestFileRequest.description: Request model for guest file copy.

controllerId.description: Unique identifier for the storage controller

name.description: Display name of the storage controller

maxDevices.description: Maximum number of devices this controller can support

supportsHotPlug.description: Whether the controller supports hot-plug operations

StorageControllerResponse.description: Response model for storage controller information

deviceId.description: Unique identifier for the storage device

name.description: Display name of the storage device

deviceType.description: Type of storage device (VirtualDisk, PhysicalDisk, DVD, Floppy)

path.description: Path to the storage file (for virtual devices)

controllerId.description: Controller the device is attached to

size.description: Size of the storage device in bytes

supportsHotPlug.description: Whether the device supports hot-plug operations

StorageDeviceResponse.description: Response model for storage device information

StorageLocation.description: Suggested location for VHDX storage on a drive.

VmCreationMode.description: Tryb tworzenia VM - HCS lub WMI.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Operacje na zadaniach związanych z pamięcią masową.
